diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -58,31 +58,13 @@
             nn.Linear(256, 60)

         )

         

-        # Radiation components (6 scalars)

-        self.radiation_head = nn.Sequential(

+        # Combined radiation and precipitation components (8 scalars)

+        self.rad_precip_head = nn.Sequential(

             nn.Linear(hidden_dims[0], 128),

             nn.BatchNorm1d(128),

             nn.ReLU(),

             nn.Dropout(0.1),

-            nn.Linear(128, 6)

-        )

-        

-        # Precipitation components (2 scalars)

-        self.precip_head = nn.Sequential(

-            nn.Linear(hidden_dims[0], 128),

-            nn.BatchNorm1d(128),

-            nn.ReLU(),

-            nn.Dropout(0.1),

-            nn.Linear(128, 2)

-        )

-        

-        # Additional scalar outputs (net shortwave, downward longwave)

-        self.other_scalars_head = nn.Sequential(

-            nn.Linear(hidden_dims[0], 128),

-            nn.BatchNorm1d(128),

-            nn.ReLU(),

-            nn.Dropout(0.1),

-            nn.Linear(128, 2)

+            nn.Linear(128, 8)

         )

     

     def forward(self, x):

@@ -90,11 +72,9 @@
         

         temp_out = self.temp_head(shared_features)

         humid_out = self.humid_head(shared_features)

-        radiation_out = self.radiation_head(shared_features)

-        precip_out = self.precip_head(shared_features)

-        other_scalars_out = self.other_scalars_head(shared_features)

+        rad_precip_out = self.rad_precip_head(shared_features)

         

         # Concatenate all outputs

-        output = torch.cat([temp_out, humid_out, radiation_out, precip_out, other_scalars_out], dim=1)

+        output = torch.cat([temp_out, humid_out, rad_precip_out], dim=1)

         

         return output
